parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'count', count(*),
  'proposals', json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.sent_at)
) AS report FROM (
  SELECT pr.id, pr.title, pr.total_price, pr.sent_at,
         EXTRACT(DAY FROM now() - pr.sent_at)::int AS days_waiting,
         p.id AS project_id, p.name AS project_name,
         c.name AS client_name, pii_decrypt(c.email_enc) AS client_email
  FROM proposals pr
  JOIN projects p ON p.id = pr.project_id
  LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.id = p.client_id
  WHERE pr.status = 'sent_to_client'
    AND pr.sent_at < now() - INTERVAL '7 days'
    AND pr.client_response_at IS NULL
) t;
SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key='architect_email'
INSERT INTO activity_log (action, agent_name, details) VALUES ('proposal_followup_check_ok', 'cron_proposal_response_followup', $1::jsonb);
